line: Hi! I'm AO. You must be new around here!
Oh wow! Is that a Bible!?
Can we open it?
Woah, it's raw light!
Raw light is energy I can use!
I can also scan it to learn where it came from.
Beep boop... scanning... beep boop...
Ah HA! I found a signal, but I don't have the energy to connect us.
Can you give me the raw light to power me up?
Awwww! That's to bad.
Well, let me know if you change your mind sometime! Just click anywhere twice on the ground I'll re-appear.
Okay, here we go!
The signal is soft, but let me focus and on it... aaaand got it!
Hello? Hello? Is someone there?
YOU ARE? And you can hear me!?
Let me guess, you're probably looking at big ol Bible?
I'm embarrassed to say I got lost in here...
So why don't we help each other out?
I'll teach you about the Bible and you can explore it to find me! What do you say?
Aww come on, we have to help him!!
PRETTY PRETTY Please???
Awww yes! You're going to love this.
Right! The Bible is the adventure of a lifetime, even if it's easy to get a bit lost in it...
You've probably heard the Old Testament and the New Testament? Kind of funny names if you ask me - BOTH testaments are pretty OLD by now.
Maybe they should call it the Old and Older testaments? Ha! Anyway, it's better to think of the Bible as one, epic story!
The Bible contains 70 books that God wrote over roughly 2,000 years using Humanity itself as His pen!
It's so old that it was first written on scrolls because books hadn't even been invented!
But when completed it was composed of 49 scrolls. - 22 for the OT and 27 for NT. Go ahead poke around a bit!
These 49 scrolls have clear divisions that make 70 separate sections we know today as the books of the Bible.
There are a few different arrangements people like to put the books in, but the material is all the same.
For example, most Bibles today combine the 5 books of the Psalms into 1 really big book. That's why most people talk about the Bible having 66 books. But it's really 70 total!
SOOOoooOOOoo yeah now that you know a bit about the Bible maybe you could... find me... and rescue me... pretty please... ?
OH THANK YOU!!
Whhhhat!?
oh... uhm... maybe you'll change your mind. At least I've got coffee and a Bible so it's not too bad.
I can wait another decade or so for the next person to come along... But let me tell you this beef jerky is getting pretty stale.
Well if you change your mind let me know okay?
